case_title: THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA VS. BRUCE JAY FRIEDMAN

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FRIEDMAN, BRUCE JAY (SBN 57053) $11,088.00 PRINCIPAL, $300.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,388.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

WRIT MAY ISSUE ON AUG-01-2017 IF NO MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT
